_comment: Menu extraction regression corpus. Each entry: { url, label, expected: { framework, cuisine, type, columnCount, mustContainItem?, mustNotContainItem?, minItems?, minSections? } }. Used by server/scripts/runMenuRegression.js.

expected._note: Sake items get column-flattened into wrong section. Acceptable as long as no fake all-caps sections appear and no Your-choice-of fragments survive.

restaurants.label: Cabra Chicago (Squarespace homepage with event h1s)

expected._note: After the promo/food-hint guards, homepage extraction should NOT emit Sunday Swim / Industry Nights / etc. Acceptable for the homepage to yield null.

restaurants.label: Ken Ken Sushi (GoDaddy iSteam image menu)

expected._note: Menu is two embedded JPEGs hosted at img1.wsimg.com. Page-image OCR must pick them up (verified the URL filter via collectImageUrls).
